amendments.text: [For turbo-propeller powered airplanes, each engine mount and its supporting structure must be designed for the gyroscopic loads that result with the engines at maximum continuous r.p.m. under either of the following conditions: (a) The conditions prescribed in Secs. 23.351 and 23.423. (b) All possible combinations of the following: (1) A yaw velocity of 2.5 radians per second. (2) A pitch velocity of 1 radian per second. (3) A normal load factor of 2.5. (4) Maximum continuous thrust.]
